rulings.Case Title: SHUMEI FANG VS. HON HUI ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motio To Compel Arbitration
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Tuesday October 23, 2018 line 1. Notice Of Motion To Compel Arbitration GRANTED. Based on allegations in the Complaint and supporting evidence, this action shall proceed in arbitration. Rosenthal v. Great Western Fin. Securities Corp. (1996) 14 Cal.4th 394. Plaintiff's reliance on Main v. Merrill Lynch, Pierce, Fenner & Smith, Inc. (1977) 67 Cal.App.3d 19 is misplaced. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: ALAN CHONG ET AL VS. ANDREA LEUNG ET AL

rulings.Case Title: YENN YEN LAI VS. ALLAN CHI ET AL
